accepted.reason: Character trigram indexing and normalized similarity scoring provide strong standalone string-kernel optimization signal.
Core Gibbs motif routines (frequency counting, propensity, entropy, posterior sampling) are high-value iterative kernels.
Image augmentation loops (noise and bilinear resize) are practical pixel-wise kernels with clear performance characteristics.
Iterative convergence loop over matrix/vector inputs is a classic numeric kernel useful for optimization traces.
Tone-mark decoding and pinyin conversion logic provide nontrivial Unicode/string transformation kernels.

skipped.reason: Language feature/coercion demonstration script rather than a coherent standalone optimization kernel.
Operator-overload test utility for custom list class; lower-value as general compute-kernel training data.
Mandelbrot/fractal pattern is already represented in the existing unpaired set.
Request/channel lifecycle wrapper code is infrastructure-oriented rather than standalone computational kernel content.
Tightly coupled to pysph internals and external particle-array abstractions, limiting standalone portability.
